name: Collage HR
description: Bilingua Canadian HR software with integrated payroll and benefits services. Collage is a complete HR solution for Canadian businesses. Learn more about Collage HR

reviews.review_title: Excellent employee onboarding experience
reviews.author_profession: Co-Founder, Vice President and General Manager
reviews.review_description: HR Compliance
reviews.review_pros: The best part of this software is its digital signature and onboarding features. Hiring employees, signing employment agreements and ensuring all the right information is collected during the onboarding process is now a snap!
reviews.review_cons: The platform continues to be developed, so it is a matter of time before improvements are made. I wish the documents feature had a "Sort" function so documents can be sorted by name or by date, to improve search capabilities.

reviews.review_title: A review of collage from a hiring manager
reviews.review_description: Streamlined, effortless, game-changing, and the staff are all super helpful and kind. On many occasions I have reached out to [SENSITIVE CONTENT], she has responded quickly and been great at helping me with the issues I was having.
reviews.review_pros: This software has really impacted the way our company hires. We are a construction company and are expanding quickly, bringing on around 4 new hires a week. Collage has made the entire vetting and onboarding process streamlined and effortless by consolidating everything into one easy timeline. The best part is you have full control over where the candidate is in the timeline, right from their application to onboarding, furthermore you can make notes and track the vetting process at each stage. I think what has saved us the most headache is how easy the onboarding process is, being able to send out multiple documents and training packages at the click of a button is game-changing.
reviews.review_cons: To be honest I really haven't found anything that I don't like. At the moment, one of the biggest things that we are working on is planning out a set of clear goals and key performance indicators that we could use to track our employees' progress. I'm not sure if this is something that we would be able to utilize collage for, we have briefly spoken about it with our representative. We would be looking to integrate our scheduling software with whatever software we use to use data to track the employees' goals.

reviews.review_title: Great for a newer product
reviews.review_pros: I like the Recruitment and performance modules however they can be difficult to navigate at times.
reviews.review_cons: Wish that it was easier to see when vacations were taking place in more of a calendar style view.

reviews.review_title: User Friendly!
reviews.review_description: As an HR professional, Collage is one of the simplest HRIS platforms I have ever used and I would highly recommend it to other companies. The benefits integration with our provider makes it so simple for the HR team and the admin required is painless!
reviews.review_pros: Collage is so user friendly. It makes onboarding very easy and very little training is needed in order for a new employee to be able to use Collage.
reviews.review_cons: There are still some areas of improvement that can be made to the APS, but I have seen improvement slowly be implement over the last couple of years. I look forward to the continued development of it. Also, with the training platform, we use it a lot to track all of our training but again, some room for small improvements here too. For example, ensuring that the employee has actually reviewed the content before being able to click they have completed it. Recently quizzes have been added which is a fantastic addition.

reviews.review_title: Tetranex Solutions Review
reviews.review_description: Collage has greatly reduced our HR costs. We are very happy to have switched over and look forward to growing together.
reviews.review_pros: Collage is very straight forward and easy to navigate. The price is great compared to our former web-based software HR platform and the fact that it is Canadian is very helpful. The benefit administration has also proven to be very helpful. Online support always follows up, and I very much appreciate that.
reviews.review_cons: I know Collage is still relatively new, but some of the feature requests that have been submitted still haven't come to fruition. For example, the inability to sort reports with the platform. I wish you could click on a report column heading and have it auto-sort (i.e. alpahbetically, numerically, etc). I also have requested the ability to create folders in each individuals "Documents" tab so we can organize documents accordingly.

reviews.review_title: Great for a start up company
reviews.review_description: Overall, I find it very useful for day to day HR functions. It is also a safe way to have employees upload sensitive information
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use - intuitive for the most part. Does a great job of automating recruitment and onboarding. Also really great at keeping track of employee data
reviews.review_cons: there are some areas that just are not robust enough - the training , the performance management.

reviews.review_title: Basic, but it does the job
reviews.review_description: Track employee information in one spot! Helps to make onboarding, offboarding and vacation/time off requests easy.
reviews.review_pros: Good system when it was offered for free. Makes onboarding/offboarding easy with customized email reminders to make the experience seamless. Allows a company to have important information in one spot. Also great for tracking vacation and time-off requests.
reviews.review_cons: No longer offered for free. Great for small to medium sized companies, but I wouldn't recommend it for a larger company. There are comparable options out there.

reviews.review_title: Easy to Use
reviews.review_description: I've used collage regularly for requesting time off and documentation. It's nice to have one place to go.
reviews.review_pros: I am able to easily request vacation time and other time for days off. I can also easily find any documents I am looking for within Collage.
reviews.review_cons: It would nice if "Company Calendars" was an actual calendar however it easily syncs with google calendar so it's not a big deal.

reviews.review_title: Simple, clean, basic HRIS - perfect for SMB's!
reviews.review_description: - great features for the price-point, perfectly serves a SMB that doesn't need enterprise-level HRIS software - very basic without comprehensive set of features, although they take feedback seriously and are making constant improvements!
reviews.review_pros: - clean and easy to use as a user or admin - employee "self serve" or "self enrolment" options to enter their own info - integrates seamlessly with benefits provider - mobile-friendly

reviews.review_title: A solid HR system
reviews.review_pros: - As a department head, it's easy to manage staff - Staff find the interface simple to use - Integration into calendars is very useful
reviews.review_cons: - For some reason, my login sessions never last past a single use.

reviews.review_title: Great intuitive HRIS for small to mid sized businesses
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: The software doesn't do everything that I'd like it to do now but I've used many HRIS and there is always something that is a miss in any system. But Collage seems to listen and is constantly launching updates and improvements and I know they will get there. The service people there are always trying to make it better. It really is a system and company geared to truly supporting our business and HR people out there.
reviews.review_pros: I really like the software if intuitive as an HR person. The customer service and support has also been great so far. The feature suggestion button is great and they actually do listen to customer feedback. The connection to our benefits is a nice feature. The ability to set email reminders to employees is also great.
reviews.review_cons: It is still evolving and there are some small enhancements that need to be done but I have confidence they will get done over time since Collage seems very in tune with their customer. The performance review module is good but needs some ability to be able to set dates to launch it in the future and to also repeat those dates and as of now you need to set a launch date each and every time for every single person. I'm not so sure about exchanges with payrolls and other systems.

reviews.review_title: Collage HR Review
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: At this specific time in Collage's lifespan, I would be hesitant to recommend them unless you were looking for something very basic. But even then, WebHR is comparable in price and has a plethora of useful features that Collage does not.
reviews.review_pros: The employee directory, organizational chart, and employee profiles are very user friendly. Even our more mature staff who barely use email were able to maneuver through the software.
reviews.review_cons: Collage is very new and contains minimal features. Their time off module didn't seem to work for us as they couldn't get time off requests down to the hour.

reviews.review_title: I seriously love it
reviews.review_description: Collage is fantastic for my place of work. We have a lot of employees, so this made onboarding super easy and facilitated in payroll and scheduling.
reviews.review_pros: Collage has made administrative tasks easier than any other similar platform I've ever used at a job. It is completely user-friendly and I feel secure in the data protection. It has made booking off time, sorting through financials, and onboarding so simple. I love it.
reviews.review_cons: It is very quick to time me out and log me off! Which I guess is a strong security feature but sometimes I feel as though it booted me out too quickly. Otherwise I have zero complaints about this software and hopefully will be able to keep using it for years to come.

reviews.review_title: Collage is a perfect fit for our needs. I'm impressed with quality of customer support!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to use. Updates and new features are proposed on a real regularly basis. Custumer support is great. Design is lean and effective!
reviews.review_cons: As is a new product, some features are missing, but since I started working with Collage a lot of the missing features have been developed or are in their backlog. Collage team is also really interested in our feedback.

reviews.review_title: Good experience with a helpful tool
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Everything centralized in one place, better time off tracking, easier to track reviews.
reviews.review_pros: Simple, clean design with the features that we need. Less complicated and easier to use than other similar products such as Bamboo HR. Customer service is generally prompt and I can see that updates and improvements are being made. The price is right as well!
reviews.review_cons: I've experienced a couple bugs, some of which I'm still waiting to get fixed. A few features such as the calendar function don't work well with our cloud environment and some other features like the time off policy and PTO calendar editing permissions are a little inflexible for our needs but we have found workarounds.

reviews.review_title: user friendly, easily accessible anywhere/anytime, great reporting
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I like that its very easy of use and there is a logical flow and sequence to adding or editing information. I also like that it is web based so I can access information anywhere I have an internet connection.

reviews.review_title: Collage created a hassle-free product that simplifies the information transfer process for our team.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: - vacation tracking and approvals - self-serve benefits admin
reviews.review_pros: self-serve benefits admin for employees - love how Collage's functionality gives the employee the power to manage their own coverage and information updates.
reviews.review_cons: some quirks: vac listed as hours *and* days, can't click into vac dates, lack of viewing permissions, custom fields have to be completed after onboarding, manager cannot override vacation in probation period

reviews.review_title: Why Collage HR is the All-In-One HR Management Platform You Need
reviews.review_description: Overall, Collage HR is an excellent HR management platform that has streamlined our HR processes and improved our overall efficiency. While there are some areas for improvement, the platform's robust features and ease of use make it a valuable tool for any HR team.
reviews.review_pros: As a user of Collage HR software in a company, I can confidently say that it has significantly improved our human resources processes. Collage HR is an all-in-one HR management platform that includes features such as employee onboarding, time off management, benefits administration, performance management, and more. The platform is easy to use and provides a comprehensive view of all HR activities.One of the standout features of Collage HR is its employee onboarding process. The platform provides a customizable onboarding checklist that guides new hires through the necessary steps to get up and running. Additionally, Collage HR has made it easy for our HR team to manage employee benefits. The platform allows us to easily enroll employees in benefits and manage ongoing changes.Another positive aspect of Collage HR is its reporting capabilities. The platform provides a variety of HR reports that give us insight into key HR metrics, such as employee turnover and benefits utilization. The reports are easy to generate and provide valuable data that helps us make informed decisions.
reviews.review_cons: there are also some areas where Collage HR could improve. The platform does not currently offer a native payroll feature, which means we have to use a separate payroll system. Additionally, the platform's performance management module could be more robust, with additional features such as goal setting and career development plans.

reviews.review_title: Extremely disappointed
reviews.review_description: I rarely write reviews, and when I do they're almost always very positive ones. Unfortunately, I cannot express how dissatisfied I am with my experience using Collage and it's gotten to a point where I felt compelled to write the review I would have liked to read during my selection process. - I was lied to during the selection process, their 'automations' are all manual and error-prone. Since a lot of it is manual, the time-savings aren't as high as they promised. - Employees pays are frequently wrong and it's quite frustrating for our employees (and for me as the manager). - Vacation tracking was off and caused more frustrations with employees - And the list goes on and on.
reviews.review_pros: I like the simplicity of the software and the ease of use.
reviews.review_cons: Missing a bunch of features promised during the selection process. Their time off feature is terrible, they don't adapt for holidays and we've paid employees who have left the company too much because of the way Collage's software is configured.

reviews.review_title: Gets the job done but could improve
reviews.review_description: It gets the job done, but I wish things like syncing calendars to outlook was easier, or MS Team was included on the calendar sync
reviews.review_pros: Reports are easy to access, and time off is easy to input
reviews.review_cons: I wish the report were more customizable

reviews.review_title: Made our HR process way more efficient
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, it's been a great time saver and wonderful to have everything in one place.
reviews.review_pros: I love that it's easy to use for all staff, regardless of their tech capacities. The deployment was seamless and Collage made it really easy with one on one training for admin. It has made things like recruitment, employee data base management and time-off tracking SO much better for our company and diminished so many manual processes before.
reviews.review_cons: There are not that many cons. There are a few features that would be nice to add - but I am sure they will come as they continue to work on the software.

reviews.review_title: Intuitive, great HRIS with excellent customer service
reviews.review_description: It's been amazing for the price, the whole company has really adopted it quickly, even the older staff. It's a beautiful user interface to be honest, we have removed a lot of issues around time-off and around performance management and saved on recruiting costs.
reviews.review_pros: Its ease of use, the customer support is amazing, always new updates making it better. Recruiting integration with indeed.com. Performance reviews. Integrates with GWL benefits and Wagepoint payroll.
reviews.review_cons: Training module has potential to be a bit more comprehensive, would be nice to be able to design courses in the software. Time-off could use a bit more detail when it presents on the company Outlook calendar, would be nice to see the exact hours people are off during each particular day.

reviews.review_title: Our company loves Collage!
reviews.review_description: We did not have an HRIS before Collage so we improved so many things I hardly know where to start: even just having an automated way to track time off was a big bonus for us. We love the PTO calendars and the onboarding and offboarding tasks. The ATS was a huge improvement because it made it so much easier to keep track of interview processes with multiple people involved. And my account manager is always there to walk through new ideas with me and help me make the most of Collage.
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to get up and running, very intuitive from both user and administrator perspective, and their customer support is outstanding.
reviews.review_cons: When we first started using Collage there were a few minor annoyances, but their product development team is so responsive, most of these have all been resolved in the 9 months since we have been using it. The only thing left they need is Single Sign-On with Google.

reviews.review_title: Excellent for a small business
reviews.review_pros: Easy and simple to use. Always updating and improving their product. Easy to contact customer service who always answers my questions in a timely manner.
reviews.review_cons: Some improvements could be made with annotating documents. There should be an option for us to be able to create our own dynamic fields.

reviews.review_title: The right solution at the right time
reviews.review_description: Collage has been a fantastic partner. From the on-boarding process to occasional support, they are professional, friendly and great at what they do!
reviews.review_pros: The system is very intuitive and easy to operate. Both administrative staff and employees enjoy the simplicity of the platform.
reviews.review_cons: I would like thought and design into the HR policy and procedure requirements that a company has. A documentation and review management policy app would really help manage an overwhelming process.
